results.description: Full shared KV cache copied to every agent region; steady-state decode reads are local.
One shared KV home; each agent remotely pulls the full shared KV every decode step.
Shared KV stays at the center; agents send small queries and receive attention states.

extra.packet_model: query bytes in, exact FP32 online-softmax state out

results.description: Legacy full-serpentine ring: one small packet per agent decode step circulates around all regions.

extra.network_formula: ceil(total_packets / (min(1, link_bytes_per_cycle / packet_bytes) / bubble_factor)) + ring_setup_hops * hop_latency_cycles
extra.packet_model: legacy fixed whole-query + aggregated online state

results.description: KV-stationary, query-tiled shard-local attention with exact online-softmax reduction.

extra.layer_granularity: metrics aggregate all layers; formulas preserve layers/heads explicitly
